metadata.name: Set Up a New Employee in the Payroll System

description: A new employee has been hired. The payroll specialist needs to add them to the payroll system before the next pay run.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new hire paperwork, including their W-4 for tax withholding and direct deposit information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives all necessary forms and data.

nodes.task_description: Create a new employee record in the payroll system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the new employee profile.

nodes.task_description: Enter the employee's salary, federal and state tax withholding information, benefit deductions, and direct deposit details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately enters all required payroll data.
